commandText:
SELECT "b0"."Id", "b0"."CreatedAt", "b0"."Name", "b0"."OwnerId", "b0"."Slug", "s"."Id", "s"."AvgDurationMinutes", "s"."BusinessId", "s"."Name"
FROM (
    SELECT "b"."Id", "b"."CreatedAt", "b"."Name", "b"."OwnerId", "b"."Slug"
    FROM "Businesses" AS "b"
    WHERE "b"."Slug" = @__slug_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS "b0"
LEFT JOIN "ServiceTypes" AS "s" ON "b0"."Id" = "s"."BusinessId"
ORDER BY "b0"."Id"

SELECT "t"."Id", "t"."BusinessId", "t"."CalledAt", "t"."CompletedAt", "t"."CustomerToken", "t"."JoinedAt", "t"."NoShowRiskScore", "t"."PredictedWaitMinutes", "t"."RowVersion", "t"."ServiceTypeId", "t"."Status", "s"."Id", "s"."AvgDurationMinutes", "s"."BusinessId", "s"."Name"
FROM "Tickets" AS "t"
INNER JOIN "ServiceTypes" AS "s" ON "t"."ServiceTypeId" = "s"."Id"
WHERE "t"."BusinessId" = @__businessId_0 AND "t"."Status" IN (
    SELECT "a"."value"
    FROM json_each(@__activeStatuses_1) AS "a"
)
ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN "t"."Status" = 'Waiting' THEN 0
    WHEN "t"."Status" = 'Called' THEN 1
    ELSE 2
END, "t"."JoinedAt"

SELECT "t"."Id", "t"."BusinessId", "t"."CalledAt", "t"."CompletedAt", "t"."CustomerToken", "t"."JoinedAt", "t"."NoShowRiskScore", "t"."PredictedWaitMinutes", "t"."RowVersion", "t"."ServiceTypeId", "t"."Status", "s"."Id", "s"."AvgDurationMinutes", "s"."BusinessId", "s"."Name"
FROM "Tickets" AS "t"
INNER JOIN "ServiceTypes" AS "s" ON "t"."ServiceTypeId" = "s"."Id"
WHERE "t"."BusinessId" = @__businessId_0 AND "t"."Status" IN (
    SELECT "a"."value"
    FROM json_each(@__activeStatuses_1) AS "a"
)
ORDER BY CASE
    WHEN "t"."Status" = 'Waiting' THEN 0
    WHEN "t"."Status" = 'Called' THEN 1
    ELSE 2
END, "t"."JoinedAt"
